description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsPeacock green printed briefs, has a soft elasticated waistband, low waist and double layer gussetMaterial and Care85% polyester and 15% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry
